title: Login page not loading
description: Users cannot access the login page on the website.

title: Payment gateway timeout
description: Payments fail due to timeout during checkout.

title: Profile update not saving
description: Changes in user profile are not saved.

title: Email notifications delayed
description: Order confirmation emails arrive very late.

title: Dashboard loading slowly
description: Dashboard takes too long to load after login.

title: Search results not appearing
description: Search feature returns no results for valid queries.

title: Mobile layout broken
description: UI elements overlap on mobile devices.

title: Password reset email missing
description: Users are not receiving password reset emails.

title: File upload error
description: Uploading documents fails in the support form.

title: Notification count incorrect
description: Unread notification count does not update properly.
